title: Not Enough Pots
description: Put all plants into flower pots
body:
![Not Enough Pots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbfd7f64aa91c8f366d31eba613295befdca4023_0.webp) ### **Place all your plants in flower pots.**
> _Ever wondered why you can't place some plants in flower pots?
> Well, now you can!_
- Adds **94** Flower Pot Variants of their Plants _(in v1.5)_
#### For compatibility with _Farmer's Delight_ see: [Potted Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/potted-delight)

![Plants Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e29c2cb1866bac385c1384d9aa0b2f68ce3d25c0_0.webp) ![Plants Grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf18d7c3394a2045ceff68a9bf450bfcb521fd8e.png)
